headline: Chipotle Sets Recipe For Growth With 2026 Expansion And Digital Focus
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE:CMG) has outlined its new "Recipe for Growth" strategy following its Q4 results. The company is targeting 350 to 370 new restaurant openings in 2026 as part of its expansion plans. Management highlighted strong digital sales as a key pillar supporting the growth framework. Chipotle Mexican Grill, trading at around $37.22 per share, is rolling out this plan at a time when its 1-year return sits at a 31.0% decline, while longer horizons show gains of 23.2% over 3...
